sub_modules.conv3d_coord: Converts the linear input stream index into depth, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Detects when the current coordinate has a complete valid-padding 3D convolution window.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_gen: Forms the K1 by K2 by K3 sliding 3D window from the buffered flattened volume and current input voxel.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Computes the unsigned parallel multiply-accumulate sum for all window voxels and kernel coefficients.
sub_modules.conv3d_output_clip: Truncates the wide accumulator to the top-level output width.
